prompt: Out of position on a wet board, draw pressure stays high and your improvement path is thin. Choose the best action.
why_v1: Wet boards out of position create too much pressure when you cannot improve cleanly enough to continue.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The wet out-of-position pressure points to a fold.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Let the wet-board pressure drive the choice: out of position with thin improvement and heavy draw pressure, this spot folds rather than drifting into a weak continue.
